$(c_0 v + c_1 + (c_2 + c_3\sin(c_4+t))(c_5 x + c_6))/(c_5 x + c_6)$

### Candidate 33:
Let me expand carefully:
$\frac{c_0(c_1 v(c_0+c_2 t) + (c_0+c_2 t)(c_3-x)(c_4+t) + (c_4+t)(c_5 t+c_6)) + c_7(c_4+t)\sin(c_8+t)}{c_4+t}$

This is complex. Let me denote A = c0+c2t, B = c4+t.

Numerator: c0(c1·v·A + A·(c3-x)·B + B·(c5t+c6)) + c7·B·sin(c8+t)

= c0·c1·v·A + c0·A·(c3-x)·B + c0·B·(c5t+c6) + c7·B·sin(c8+t)

Dividing by B:
= c0·c1·v·A/B + c0·A·(c3-x) + c0·(c5t+c6) + c7·sin(c8+t)

= c0·c1·v·(c0+c2t)/(c4+t) + c0·(c0+c2t)·(c3-x) + c0·(c5t+c6) + c7·sin(c8+t)

This has v·(c0+c2t)/(c4+t), x·(c0+c2t), sin(t), polynomial in t. No v·exp(-x). **[NO MATCH]**

Candidate 33 verdict: [NO MATCH]
